Vincent - good morning. 
As 
 has probably explained, email below relates to Gerard's note last night... Vita has

Hope this is clear!
Michael

Hi Gerard,

). 
Vita
On Wed, 18 Dec 2024 at 18:58, Michael Roberts <
> 
wrote:
Gerard, good evening again,
You asked earlier today whether an individual from the House of Lords needs to go 
through vetting. 
From a recap of the paper at GSB in October, such an individual would be exempt. Tom 
and Vita will be best placed to answer further policy questions (and I must confess to never 
knowing how STRAP works at the best of times, never mind in this scenario!).
best,
Michael
-- 
Michael Roberts
Assurance Deputy Director
UKSV, Government Security Group
Cabinet Office
